languages.text: "Что за еретический бред?" {n}Женщина устало потирает виски.{/n} "Да, у нас сложности с Инквизицией. Но несколько иного толка".

traits.locale_text: "Что за еретический бред?" {n}Женщина устало потирает виски.{/n} "Да, у нас сложности с Инквизицией. Но несколько иного толка".

languages.text: "What kind of heretical nonsense is this?" {n}The woman tiredly rubs her temples.{/n} "Yes, we have our difficulties with the Inquisition. But they are of a somewhat different nature."
languages.original_text: "Что за еретический бред?" {n}Женщина устало потирает виски.{/n} "Да, у нас сложности с Инквизицией. Но несколько иного толка".

languages.text: “这是什么异端胡话？”{n}女子疲倦地揉着太阳穴。{/n}“没错，我们跟审判庭之间是有矛盾。但完全不是你说的这种。”
languages.original_text: "What kind of heretical nonsense is this?" {n}The woman tiredly rubs her temples.{/n} "Yes, we have our difficulties with the Inquisition. But they are of a somewhat different nature."

traits.locale_text: “这是什么异端胡话？”{n}女子疲倦地揉着太阳穴。{/n}“没错，我们跟审判庭之间是有矛盾。但完全不是你说的这种。”

languages.text: « Qu'est-ce encore que ces divagations hérétiques ? {n}crache la femme en se massant les tempes d'un air las.{/n} Nous avons certes des difficultés avec l'Inquisition, mais elles sont d'une tout autre nature. »
languages.original_text: "What kind of heretical nonsense is this?" {n}The woman tiredly rubs her temples.{/n} "Yes, we have our difficulties with the Inquisition. But they are of a somewhat different nature."

traits.locale_text: « Qu'est-ce encore que ces divagations hérétiques ? {n}crache la femme en se massant les tempes d'un air las.{/n} Nous avons certes des difficultés avec l'Inquisition, mais elles sont d'une tout autre nature. »

languages.text: "Ne kâfirce bir zırvalık bu?" {n}Kadın, yorgunca şakaklarını ovuşturuyor.{/n} "Engizisyon ile zorluklar yaşasak da bunların doğası başka."
languages.original_text: "What kind of heretical nonsense is this?" {n}The woman tiredly rubs her temples.{/n} "Yes, we have our difficulties with the Inquisition. But they are of a somewhat different nature."

traits.locale_text: "Ne kâfirce bir zırvalık bu?" {n}Kadın, yorgunca şakaklarını ovuşturuyor.{/n} "Engizisyon ile zorluklar yaşasak da bunların doğası başka."

languages.text: «¿Qué clase de ridiculez herética es esta?». {n}La mujer se frota las sienes con aspecto cansado.{/n} «Sí, estamos teniendo problemas con la Inquisición, pero son algo distintos».
languages.original_text: "What kind of heretical nonsense is this?" {n}The woman tiredly rubs her temples.{/n} "Yes, we have our difficulties with the Inquisition. But they are of a somewhat different nature."

traits.locale_text: «¿Qué clase de ridiculez herética es esta?». {n}La mujer se frota las sienes con aspecto cansado.{/n} «Sí, estamos teniendo problemas con la Inquisición, pero son algo distintos».

languages.text: "Was für ein ketzerischer Unsinn ist das?" {n}Die Frau reibt sich müde die Schläfen.{/n} "Ja, wir haben unsere Probleme mit der Inquisition. Aber sie sind etwas anderer Natur."
languages.original_text: "What kind of heretical nonsense is this?" {n}The woman tiredly rubs her temples.{/n} "Yes, we have our difficulties with the Inquisition. But they are of a somewhat different nature."

traits.locale_text: "Was für ein ketzerischer Unsinn ist das?" {n}Die Frau reibt sich müde die Schläfen.{/n} "Ja, wir haben unsere Probleme mit der Inquisition. Aber sie sind etwas anderer Natur."

languages.text: 「これは何という異端の愚かなことだ？」{n}女は疲れて眉をこすった。{/n}「ええ、宗教裁判所とのやり取りは大変ですが、それは少し異なる性質のものですよ。」
languages.original_text: "What kind of heretical nonsense is this?" {n}The woman tiredly rubs her temples.{/n} "Yes, we have our difficulties with the Inquisition. But they are of a somewhat different nature."

traits.locale_text: 「これは何という異端の愚かなことだ？」{n}女は疲れて眉をこすった。{/n}「ええ、宗教裁判所とのやり取りは大変ですが、それは少し異なる性質のものですよ。」
